summary: Successfully tested Service Due delete functionality. Both single delete (trash icon) and bulk delete (checkbox selection + Delete Selected button) work correctly. Deleted records persist after page refresh.

issues: Total Tracked count (370) doesn't update immediately after deletes - shows stale count until page refresh

critical_code_review_comments: Service Due delete implementation uses 'dismissed_service_due' collection to track deleted records - records are not truly deleted but filtered out from view
handleDeleteServiceDue function (line 6049) correctly posts to /api/dismissed-service-due endpoint
handleBulkDelete function (line 6099) correctly posts to /api/dismissed-service-due/bulk endpoint
Local state (dismissedKeys) is updated immediately for responsive UI
Backend endpoints properly validate auth and handle edge cases (empty items returns 400, non-existent key returns 404)
seed_data_creation: Created test dismissed records with TEST- and BULK-TEST- prefixes for backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Due delete functionality is fully working. The implementation uses a 'dismissed_service_due' MongoDB collection to track deleted/dismissed records. Records are filtered out from the view rather than truly deleted since they are derived from sales/services data. Both single delete (trash icon per row) and bulk delete (checkbox selection + Delete Selected button) are functional. Deleted records persist after page refresh.
